name: Oncology Institute, Inc.
business: The Oncology Institute, Inc. (TOI) provides value-based oncology care management services through affiliated physician-owned professional corporations (TOI PCs). It offers fee-for-service, capitation, specialty pharmacy, and clinical trials services to patients and payors.
sellsTo: Payors (managed care organizations, risk-bearing entities, independent practice associations)

exposures.sentence: The Company is a leading value-based oncology company that manages community-based oncology practices for the Company and for independent oncology practices that together serve patients across 17 markets and five states throughout the United States.

catalysts.event: Research Services Agreement with Helios CR, Inc. for profit sharing on clinical trials
catalysts.sentence: On March 31, 2025, the Company entered into a Research Services Agreement ("RSA") with Helios CR, Inc. ("Helios"), effective May 5, 2025, pursuant to which the Clinical Trials segment is operated by Helios in its entirety under a profit sharing arrangement with the Company.
